queen.translate: королева, ферзь, царица, дама, богиня, педик, царить, быть королевой, править
mnemonic: queen [кви:н] королева - (К Вин-ни) Пуху королева Англии пристала.

queen [kwi: n]
***
КОРОЛЕВОЙ стал пингвин. (это) queen
***
У королевы "queen"
ум проницательный "keen".

examples.eng: Venice, the queen of the Adriatic
She bowed before the Queen
Paris, the queen of fashion
I queened my pawn.
examples.ru: Я провёл свою пешку в ферзи.

examples.eng: I had to play my queen.
examples.ru: Мне пришлось разыграть /сыграть/ свою даму. (о картах)

examples.eng: He led the queen of hearts.
I was treated like a queen.
examples.ru: Ко мне относились как к королеве.

examples.eng: Queen's Bench
The pawn queens.
The queen bade us enter.
The king and queen had fled.
I propose a toast to the Queen.
examples.ru: Я предлагаю тост за здоровье королевы.

examples.eng: Queen Elizabeth
They necked their Queen.
The king takes the queen.
Paris is the queen of cities.
The queen ruled for 25 years.
We got a wave from the Queen.
He was ennobled by the queen.
Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II
examples.ru: Ее Величество Королева Елизавета Вторая (королева Великобритании с 1952 г.)

examples.eng: She held herself like a queen.
He played the queen of diamonds.
She was voted queen of the prom.
He dealt me the Queen of Spades.
examples.ru: Он сдал мне даму пик / пиковую даму.

examples.eng: The queen posed for her portrait.
The queen granted us an audience.
The queen entered in her eighties.
The Queen made Marlborough a duke.
The queen assumed the stately robes.
honours bestowed on him by the Queen
